name: TEN Framework
description: Builds realtime conversational voice AI agents with a low-latency, multimodal framework in C, Go, and Python. Handles audio, video, and data streams. Open source.

skills.name: Realtime Voice
skills.description: Builds low-latency conversational voice agents that stream audio in and out in real time.

skills.name: Multimodal Streams
skills.description: Processes audio, video, image, and data streams together in a single agent graph.

skills.name: Extension Graph
skills.description: Composes reusable extensions in C, Go, or Python into an execution graph for voice pipelines.
